scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @agrodomain/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter @agrodomain/config build && next build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @agrodomain/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter @agrodomain/config build && corepack pnpm run guard:contracts && corepack pnpm run guard:copy && next typegen && tsc --noEmit
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @agrodomain/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter @agrodomain/config build && corepack pnpm run guard:contracts && corepack pnpm run guard:copy && next typegen && tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @agrodomain/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter @agrodomain/config build && corepack pnpm run guard:contracts && corepack pnpm run guard:copy && vitest run
